scripts.setup:
git -C "$HELMOR_ROOT_PATH" remote get-url upstream >/dev/null 2>&1 || git -C "$HELMOR_ROOT_PATH" remote add upstream https://github.com/dohooo/helmor.git
git -C "$HELMOR_ROOT_PATH" fetch --all --prune
git -C "$HELMOR_ROOT_PATH" checkout main
git -C "$HELMOR_ROOT_PATH" rebase upstream/main
git -C "$HELMOR_ROOT_PATH" push --force-with-lease origin main
git -C "$HELMOR_WORKSPACE_PATH" rebase main
cp "$HELMOR_ROOT_PATH/.env.local" "$HELMOR_WORKSPACE_PATH/.env.local"
cp -r "$HELMOR_ROOT_PATH/sidecar/dist" "$HELMOR_WORKSPACE_PATH/sidecar/dist"
bun install
